query.description: Start date - filters by packed_at for Packed orders

request.description: Get Packed orders filtered by date range. CRITICAL: Uses packed_at timestamp (not created_at) for accurate revenue recognition timing. Only includes orders that were packed within the date range.

exec: // Test 2: Response should be JSON array
// Test 3: All orders have Packed status
pm.test('All orders have Packed status', function () {
// Test 4: All orders have packed_at within date range
pm.test('All orders packed within date range', function () {
